calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY (CONTINUED)
Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Elan Wick, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Reporter Candace Yount. (611)

APPEARANCES:
Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. representing plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corp.
Garland Leslie Hall appearing as representative for the plaintiff.
Plaintiff's witness Debra Pickens is present.

This matter comes on calendar for a Default Prove-Up Hearing, no appearance by the defendant. Counsel Rossoff addresses the court as to the merit of his default. Representative Hall is sworn and examined by court and counsel. Witness Pickens does not testify, but is present in court.

The following Plaintiff's Exhibits are marked and provided to the court for consideration;
Ex. 1 - Residential Rental Agreement for 55 Mason Street, Apt. 404, dated 7/25/03.
Ex. 2 - Three-Day Notice, dated 11/5/07.

After hearing argument and testimony, the court grants judgment in favor of the plaintiff. The Judgment is signed in open court and copies are provided to counsel (see scanned judgment for further details). Exhibits are ordered released.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-08-2008 Continued To Jan-09-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2008 Off Calendar
